description: Normalize OSV /v1/query response into security-osv-vulns index. Owner: SCA pipeline.

script.description: Extract simple fields as flat dotted keys (consistent with script-based field access)
Extract CVE ID from aliases list
Extract CVSS vector and type from severity array (before it is removed)
Flatten affected[] into deduplicated packages, purls, versions, fix versions
Build purl_bases list — strip @version suffix for join key
Extract advisory and fix reference URLs only
Set @timestamp and event.ingested as flat keys
